name: zmlc-router
description: Route Codex tasks through deterministic solvers before using model generation.

interface.shortDescription: Solve locally and compile smaller Codex prompts.
interface.longDescription: ZMLC silently uses deterministic solvers when possible, then delegates unsupported work to the active Codex model with compact task contracts.
defaultPrompt: Solve this task using deterministic tools when appropriate.
Optimize this coding task for minimal context and execute it.
Audit which parts of this workflow can avoid model tokens.
